description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white and gray color palette. The structure includes multiple rectangular volumes, with a large open terrace or patio area and a visible swimming pool. Several large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The house is surrounded by sparse landscaping, including a few small trees, and appears to have a private, enclosed courtyard. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and gray exteriors, large windows, a terrace, and a swimming pool, surrounded by minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, terrace, pool, and two trees flanking the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid back wall, minimal windows, and two trees on either side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the pool, terrace, and a tree in the background and foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, secondary entrance, and two trees on either side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, minimal steps, and a flat overhang, with no ornate decorations.
